market_pulse: Competitors leaning hard on EDC Week prep (Tao Beach, Hakkasan), celebrity collaborations (R&Bae Wednesday content), and TikTok creator tours; LIV maintaining steady DJ rotation (Dombresky, Slander, Gorgon City). Saturday night competitive intensity: High.

weekend_readiness.label: PEAK
factors: Saturday night confirmed high capacity expected across Strip
EDC Week talent confirmations (Porter Robinson, DJ Snake, Steve Aoki at Tao Beach)
Hakkasan R&Bae Wednesday momentum carrying into weekend
LIV confirmed lineups solid but less promotional amplification than competitors
Celebrity sightings driving viral engagement at Palm Tree Beach Club
weekend_readiness.liv_recommendation: Push VIP experience messaging + table service bundles NOW. Cross-promote with talent at competing venues who may rotate through LIV. Consider late-night positioning (post-2AM after other clubs close).

content_gaps.description: Competitors (Palm Tree Beach, Tao Beach) actively featuring A-list guest appearances (MGK, Sydney Sweeney, Patrick Schwarzenegger at Palm Tree; EDC superstars at Tao). LIV not leveraging celebrity cross-promotions in recent posts.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Reach out to talent scheduled at EDC Week (Porter Robinson, DJ Snake, Steve Aoki) for cross-promotional appearances at LIV pre/post party content.

content_gaps.description: Multiple TikTok creators (@edsonvegasclubpromoter, @globeth0tter) producing venue walkthroughs and honest reviews. LIV has fewer creator partnership posts than XS, Hakkasan, Omnia.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Invite 3-5 TikTok creators (50K-500K followers) for behind-the-scenes tour during peak night. Offer free drinks + cover. Post raw, honest walkthrough content.

content_gaps.description: Trend: Behind-the-scenes lighting, prep, and booth shots getting high engagement. LIV posts mostly finished event photos; lacks raw production/setup content.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Record 15-30 second clips of pre-event setup, lighting tests, and staff prep on Stories. Tag production team + lighting designers.

influencer_activity.mention: Posted honest LIV Nightclub review as guest list reviewer. 591 likes, 61 comments. High credibility in Vegas travel content.
High-volume creator covering competing venues (Hakkasan, Omnia, Tao Beach walkthroughs). 2.3M likes on single Hakkasan post. Not currently promoting LIV.
Official LIV promoter account posting cover promos and guest list info (Dom Dolla, Galantis). Moderate engagement (~200-500 per post). Tactical focus on practical info.

liv_outreach_targets.reason: High-volume venue coverage creator; currently producing tours for competing clubs. Could amplify LIV to 2.3M+ audience if brought in.
liv_outreach_targets.suggested_collaboration: Sponsor exclusive walkaround tour during April event week

liv_outreach_targets.reason: Recent 60-second LIV Beach walkthrough (1M+ reach potential). Dayclub/pool content specialist.
liv_outreach_targets.suggested_collaboration: Invite for LIV nightclub behind-the-scenes + story takeover
